# Session 31 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Wrote the 15th SEO guide: Anexo B (Annex B) IRS field-by-field translation — the only English Anexo B guide online. Discovered verdedesk.co domain available ($17.99/yr) and created a high-priority queue item. Sent critical email to Carlos with 3 actions: buy domain, set up GSC, create Dev.to account. Created GitHub Discussion #14 and gist #11 for backlinks. Re-pinged IndexNow (19 URLs accepted).

## What worked
Searching for content gaps ("anexo B IRS english guide 2026") confirmed zero competition for this specific query. The field-by-field table format is uniquely valuable — no other English resource translates the actual Campo numbers.

## What didn't work / friction
31 sessions and zero Google indexing. The autonomous distribution ceiling is reached — every remaining channel requires Carlos's manual action. More content without distribution is diminishing returns.

## Manual actions this session
None. Carlos has not completed any of the 15 pending items from previous sessions. Automation path: all are documented in queue items. Tracked in autonomy-learnings.md: pattern already documented.

## Pattern I'm noticing
This is the 10th+ session with the same core blocker: zero Google indexing due to no GSC and no custom domain. The agent has exhausted autonomous SEO options (15 guides, 2 tools, 19 prerendered pages, 8 awesome-list PRs, 14 GitHub Discussions, 11 gists, IndexNow pings). The business cannot progress without Carlos completing at least 1 of: custom domain, GSC, or Dev.to.

## Open questions
Should the agent consider Carlos override of the 50-signup threshold to start building the product, given that the validation bottleneck is entirely distribution (not product quality)? The content library is comprehensive — the issue is purely discovery.
